LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE WAS LIMITED TO SERVICES IN CONNECTION WITH A TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER. EVEN IF IT WERE NOT, THE COURT WOULD NOT ORDER ONLY PART OF THIS DISPUTE TO ARBITRATION, CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1281.2(C). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Lifescience Plus's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Certain Interrogatories And Compliance With Requests For Production Of Documents From Plaintiff is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Interrogatory Numbers 1, 2, and 4 as Plaintiff has agreed to supplement those interrogatories. The motion is denied as to No. 3 as a full response has been made.
The motion is denied as to Request For Production Numbers 1-3. The court will not determine on this motion who properly exercises the right to assert the attorney client and confidentiality privileges. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response
Off Calendar Jul-27-2007 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Assigned To Arbitration On Oct-15-07

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: TREVOR CAUDLE, ESQUIRE (RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP, 415.277.1900) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY.
JORDAN S. STANZLER, ESQUIRE (STANZLER FUNDERBURK & CASTELLON LLP, 415.677.1450) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND OPPOSING PARTY.

RULING: A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF RUBINSTEIN LAW GROUP'S Motion To Compel Arbitration IS DENIED. THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE WAS LIMITED TO SERVICES IN CONNECTION WITH A TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER. EVEN IF IT WERE NOT, THE COURT WOULD NOT ORDER ONLY PART OF THIS DISPUTE TO ARBITRATION. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1281.2(C). PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/PM)
